phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.3 - Local Operator Feedback Review Model
feedback_title: Static boundary banner needs stronger placement
feedback_summary: The reviewer may miss that the shell is local, static, read-only, fixture-only, no-network, and no-execution if the boundary notice is not repeated near the main review surface.
recommended_action: Review static boundary wording and placement before any operator handoff.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.3 - Local Operator Feedback Review Model
feedback_title: Panel hierarchy can be easier to scan
feedback_summary: The static panels could use clearer grouping between risk, opportunity, and boundary sections.
recommended_action: Document preferred panel scan order in the operator walkthrough.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.3 - Local Operator Feedback Review Model
feedback_summary: Fixture dates and review timestamps should say they are static evidence and not live market freshness indicators.
recommended_action: Add fixture timestamp notes to the static fixture documentation.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.3 - Local Operator Feedback Review Model
feedback_title: Terminology differs between QA checklist and framework index
feedback_summary: The terms static shell QA handoff, local QA framework, and boundary freeze should be aligned across review docs.
recommended_action: Use the Phase 8.3 feedback model as the terminology source for future QA notes.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.3 - Local Operator Feedback Review Model
feedback_title: Roadmap candidate for saved feedback history
feedback_summary: A future planning phase could define a static feedback history view, but this phase should only record the idea as roadmap-only.
recommended_action: Carry forward as roadmap-only input for a later boundary mapping phase.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.3 - Local Operator Feedback Review Model
feedback_title: Request to connect live broker data must be rejected
feedback_summary: A reviewer request to connect live broker or market data is outside the static-shell boundary and must not be implemented in Vol.8 Phase 8.3.
recommended_action: Reject for current phase and restate no broker/API/live data boundary.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.3 - Local Operator Feedback Review Model
feedback_title: Execution control request must wait for future gate
feedback_summary: A request to add action buttons for order placement or portfolio changes is execution-related and must be deferred until a future readiness gate.
recommended_action: Defer until a future readiness gate explicitly authorizes execution-boundary planning.
